title: Oil rises beyond $119 and Europe gas prices surge after attacks on energy facilities in Qatar, Iran
summary_full: Oil prices jumped as markets react to escalating tensions after Qatar said Iranian missile strikes damaged a key liquefied natural gas export facility.
summary_public: Oil prices jumped as markets react to escalating tensions after Qatar said Iranian missile strikes damaged a key liquefied natural gas export facility.
